Short InformationRajasthan  Public Service Commission ( RPSC ) has released Physiotherapist (NSA) Recruitment 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this RPSC Physiotherapist Vacancy can apply online from 23 July 2026 to 21 August 2026 . candidates should read the RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) 2026 Vacancy  information Notification for all the information related to the RPSC exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply.

Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist (NSA) Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2027 Minimum Age : 18 Years. Maximum Age : 40 Years. Age Relaxation as per Rajasthan Public Service Commission RPSC Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026 Rules.

Post NameTotal Post — Rajasthan RPSC Physiotherapist Eligibility Details
Rajasthan Physiotherapist (NSA)20 — 10+2 Intermediate with a Diploma in Physiotherapy . Working Knowledge of Hindi Written in Devnagari Script. Knowledge of Rajasthan Culture.
How to Fill Rajasthan Physiotherapist (NSA) Officer Online Form 2026 Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) has Released the Physiotherapist (NSA) 2026 Notification.
